name: sox-research-dashboard
description: Static SOX index research dashboard with generated finance data.

scripts.test: python3 -m py_compile scripts/fetch_sox_data.py scripts/check_sox_freshness.py scripts/test_check_sox_freshness.py && python3 scripts/test_check_sox_freshness.py && node --check assets/app.js && node --check scripts/verify.mjs && node --check scripts/static-smoke.mjs && npm run verify && npm run test:smoke
